import_update.after: from datetime import datetime, timezone, date

slug_date_gate.location: Bridge loop, after market_lookup gate, before late_inning_block gate
slug_date_gate.logic: Extract YYYY-MM-DD from MLB slug (mlb-team1-team2-YYYY-MM-DD), compare to date.today(), reject if mismatch
slug_date_gate.edge_cases: Non-MLB slugs and unparseable dates pass through silently (ValueError caught)

summary: Slug-date gate successfully implemented in bridge loop. Rejects stale-date market intents like mlb-col-sd-2026-04-09 when today is later. Non-MLB markets unaffected.
